content: Reproducible container builds: pin to digest not tag (tags are mutable), use --source-date-epoch/--rewrite-timestamp (Buildah) for timestamp normalization, commit lockfiles, use 'npm ci' not 'npm install', use 'go mod download' with committed go.sum. Teardown/recreate: stop+remove existing sandbox, rebuild image, recreate sandbox. Image tagging: convention is <name>:<version>-<date> or <name>:<sha>. Idempotency: the script should be safe to run multiple times — check if sandbox exists before create, tag images with date so reruns produce distinct artifacts.
